overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character running through a moonlit forest trail at night. The character traverses from an open pine woodland onto a ridge with visible cliffs and a prominent full moon, then descends into a denser, darker section of forest.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pine forest trail with scattered rocks

agents.ego_description: character running steadily along the forest path through open woodland

entered.detail: tall evergreen pine trees lining the left side of the trail
tall evergreen pine trees lining the right side of the trail
large gray rock formation beside the path
narrow winding dirt trail through the forest
dark silhouette of mountains visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: Character runs along a dirt trail through an open pine forest at night. Tall evergreen trees line both sides of the path with rocky outcrops visible on the left, while distant mountains appear on the horizon ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: ridge trail with cliff edge overlooking valley

events.description: full moon becomes prominently visible on the right, casting bright illumination across the landscape

agents.ego_description: character continues running along the ridge trail with a steep drop-off to the right side

entered.detail: bright full moon low in the night sky casting strong shadows
steep cliff drop-off along the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The trail opens onto an exposed ridge with a steep cliff edge on the right. The full moon becomes prominently visible, illuminating the path and the distant mountain range while the character runs along the elevated terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense pine forest with thick canopy cover

events.description: entering denser forest section with thicker tree coverage and significantly darker lighting

agents.ego_description: character runs through the darker enclosed forest, navigating slight turns as the trail winds through dense trees

entered.detail: thick overhead tree cover blocking the moonlight and sky

segments.scene_description: The character enters a denser section of forest where the trees grow closer together, blocking the moonlight and creating a darker, more enclosed atmosphere. The path becomes narrower as it winds through the thick pine trunks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit pine forest that transitions from an open woodland to an exposed ridge before descending into a dense thicket. It begins with the character running along a dirt trail flanked by tall evergreens and rocky outcrops, with distant mountains visible on the horizon. As the terrain elevates, the trail opens onto an exposed ridge with a steep cliff edge, where a prominent full moon illuminates the path and the surrounding mountain range. The scene then shifts as the character enters a denser section of the forest, where the trees grow closer together and block the moonlight. This creates a darker, more enclosed atmosphere as the path narrows and winds through the thick pine trunks.
